notes: Game launch but screen is black. Tried disable Esync, D3d11 and use winde D3d11 and nothing worked.
title: Fast Detect

notes: Unstable and will crash on the options menu. But i was able to loadup the campaign and play. The problem is it only works(ish) in windowed mode and without options it makes it a bit tricky. Use this as your launch string : -sw -noborder -w 1920 -h 1080
title: Fast Detect

notes:
To fix black screen add this to your launch options: -w 1920 -h 1080

There is no options, it crashes the game, so i needed to edit the cfg file in the Game folder to change my controls, but except that the game is playable, sometimes i get fps drops but rarely.
title: Fast Detect
